title: OACP Tool Request Payload (v1)
description: Payload schema for messages with payloadType = 'tool-request-v1' (carried in TOOL_CALL_REQUESTED messages). Tool requests are mediated by the Tool Broker per spec §10. The broker's response state machine governs ALLOW / DENY / SANITIZE / APPROVAL_NEEDED / QUARANTINE outcomes.

toolCallId.description: Stable identifier for this tool call within tenant scope.

toolId.description: The tool being invoked. MUST be in the requester's binding allowedTools (per spec §3b.2).

inputRef.description: Reference to the tool input artifact. artifactType MUST be TOOL_INPUT.

inputInline.description: Inline input. Use only when input is small (well below maxEnvelopeBytes per §2c.8) and not security-sensitive. Prefer inputRef for governed audit.

bindingId.description: Active capability binding under which this tool call is authorized. Per spec §3b.7 rule 1.

expectedResultPayloadType.description: Optional. The payload type the requester expects in the eventual TOOL_RESULT (e.g., 'tool-result-v1' or a tool-specific result schema).

timeoutMs.description: Optional. Soft timeout hint for the broker/tool dispatcher. Authoritative TTL is in the envelope ttl block.
